issues.detail: TSX prop 'ariaLevel' (type: number, optional, default 3) is absent from data props array.
TSX prop 'ariaLabel' (type: string, optional) is absent from data props array.
Data prop 'disabled' does not exist in TSX AccordionProps interface.
Data prop 'keepMounted' does not exist in TSX AccordionProps interface.
Data prop 'style' does not exist in TSX AccordionProps interface (not in QAProps or the explicit props list).
Prop 'arrowPosition': TSX default is 'end' (from destructuring: arrowPosition = 'end'), data default is 'start'.
TSX prop 'noteClassName' (type: string, optional) is absent from data props array.
Data prop 'style' does not exist in TSX ActionsPanelProps interface.

Prop 'actions': TSX type is 'ActionsPanelItem[]'; data type is 'ActionsPanelAction[] | ActionsPanelActionGroup[]'. These are different named types — ActionsPanelItem has both button and dropdown sub-config fields, not matching the data's named types.
Prop 'title': TSX type is 'React.ReactNode' (accepts any renderable content); data type is 'string' (too narrow).
Prop 'align': TSX JSDoc says @default 'baseline'; data default is 'center'.
Prop 'layout': TSX default in destructuring is 'vertical'; data default is 'horizontal'.
Data prop 'style' does not exist in TSX ArrowToggleProps interface (extends only QAProps).
TSX prop 'sizes' (type: string, optional, from AvatarImageProps — responsive image sizes attribute) is absent from data props array.
TSX prop 'withImageBorder' (type: boolean, optional, from AvatarImageProps) is absent from data props array.

Prop 'renderMore': TSX type is '(options: {count: number}) => React.ReactElement'; data type is '(overflowCount: number) => React.ReactNode'. Parameter shape '{count: number}' vs a plain number parameter, and ReactElement vs ReactNode.
Prop 'children': TSX marks it as optional (children?: React.ReactNode); data marks it as required.
TSX prop 'width' (type: React.CSSProperties['width'], optional) is absent from data props array.
TSX prop 'height' (type: React.CSSProperties['height'], optional) is absent from data props array.
TSX prop 'maxHeight' (type: React.CSSProperties['maxHeight'], optional) is absent from data props array.
TSX prop 'maxWidth' (type: React.CSSProperties['maxWidth'], optional) is absent from data props array.
TSX prop 'minHeight' (type: React.CSSProperties['minHeight'], optional) is absent from data props array.
TSX prop 'minWidth' (type: React.CSSProperties['minWidth'], optional) is absent from data props array.
TSX prop 'position' (type: React.CSSProperties['position'], optional) is absent from data props array.
TSX prop 'qa' (type: string, optional, from QAProps) is absent from data props array.
Prop 'popupStyle': TSX type is literal '"staircase"' (a string literal, not CSSProperties); data type is 'React.CSSProperties'.
Prop 'extraProps': TSX type is 'React.ButtonHTMLAttributes<HTMLButtonElement>' (or AnchorHTMLAttributes for link variant); data type is 'Record<string, unknown>'.
TSX prop 'children' (type: React.ReactNode, optional) is absent from data props array.
TSX prop 'name' (type: string, optional, from ControlProps) is absent from data props array.
TSX prop 'controlProps' (from ControlProps — passes extra attributes to the underlying input) is absent from data props array.
TSX prop 'controlRef' (type: React.Ref<HTMLInputElement>, from ControlProps) is absent from data props array.
TSX prop 'onFocus' (type: React.FocusEventHandler<HTMLInputElement>, from ControlProps) is absent from data props array.
TSX prop 'onBlur' (type: React.FocusEventHandler<HTMLInputElement>, from ControlProps) is absent from data props array.

description_pairs.data_description: A vertically stacked set of interactive headings that reveal or hide associated sections of content. Supports controlled and uncontrolled modes.
A floating panel that displays a set of actions, typically used for bulk operations on selected items. Renders at the bottom of a container.
A tooltip designed for action triggers such as icon buttons. Displays a title, optional description, and optional keyboard shortcut hotkey.
Displays an inline notification or feedback message with optional icon, title, message body, and action buttons. Supports multiple themes and visual variants.
A simple animated arrow icon that rotates to indicate an open or closed state, commonly used in dropdowns and expandable sections.
Displays a user avatar using an image, icon, or initials. Supports multiple sizes, themes, shapes, and can be rendered as a button or link.
Renders a horizontal stack of overlapping Avatar components. Automatically collapses excess avatars into a count indicator or dots.
Basic block to build other components and for standalone usage as a smart block with build in support of most usable css properties and shortcut `spacing` properties.
Displays a navigation trail showing the user's current location within a hierarchy. Automatically collapses middle items into a popup when there are too many to display.
A versatile interactive button component. Supports multiple visual styles, sizes, pin shapes, loading state, and can render as a link.
A container component that groups related content with a visual boundary. Supports selection, action, and container types with various visual styles.
A form checkbox input that supports controlled and uncontrolled modes, an indeterminate state, and optional label content.
A button that copies a specified text to the clipboard and provides visual feedback via a tooltip that changes on success.
An icon that animates between clipboard and checkmark states to represent the clipboard copy operation status.

How many columns of you 12-th column layout will take content. Must be used as a child of `Row` component. By default, component takes all available space. If you want to specify static size use `size` prop.
